response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric distributed systems work, despite some C++ exposure in academic and early career projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-language adaptability with proven open-source contributions
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing, CI/CD, and software practices
Extensive experience building scalable systems and developer tooling across diverse domains
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience documented, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No clear evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
